testcase.name: dailyTasks.getToday > AC-2: returns today DailyTask row when record exists
dailyTasks.getToday > AC-2: returns null when no record for today
dailyTasks.getToday > AC-1: queries with accountId (explicit double-layer guard)
dailyTasks.getHistory > AC-2: returns list ordered by taskDate desc
dailyTasks.getHistory > AC-1: queries with accountId isolation
dailyTasks.markCompleted > AC-2: marks task completed and recalculates completedCount
dailyTasks.markCompleted > AC-1: NOT_FOUND when record belongs to different account
dailyTasks.markCompleted > AC-2: findFirst uses accountId guard (LD-009)
dailyTasks.markCompleted > AC-4: already-completed task stays completed (idempotent)
dailyTasks.regenerateToday > AC-2: enqueues daily-task job and returns ok + scheduledDate + jobId
dailyTasks.regenerateToday > AC-2: INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR when queue add fails
dailyTasks.regenerateToday > AC-1: jobId includes accountId for per-account isolation
dailyTasks protectedProcedure guard > AC-1: getToday FORBIDDEN when activeAccountId=null
